title: Climbable
description: Adds ability to climb ladders and vines with JUMP key, similar to MC1.14+.
body:
A Minecraft mod that adds ability to climb ladders and vines with JUMP key, similar to MC1.14+.  
Most modded ladder-like blocks should be supported as well.  

This mod won't work if Aqua Acrobatics is installed. It has the same feature, just turn on Movement>New Climbing Behavior in its settings.
